race.comment: LE BEAU GOSSE (3) was runner-up on debut then not far away in fourth over 1400m at Ballarat last time. Will drift back but wind up late. Trained locally and looks close to a win. SHOMA (6) is a 12-start maiden who placed fresh at Sandown Hillside then went to Adelaide for stakes grade and was not disgraced in far tougher company in the Morphettville Guineas. This suits and gets chance to atone. ENZO CHARLEY (1) missed the frame on debut then progressed nicely at his second outing, finishing runner-up over 1300m at Avoca. Coming along nicely and should be right in the mix again. ISKADEEL (9) is a filly by Dundeel on debut. Trained on the track and looks one of the chances despite an awkward barrier. Watch the market.

Live1.SchedulerNote: Provincial **Use extended Racing.com coverage where possible**
